title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
summary: An AI agent skill that researches any topic across 14+ social platforms (Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, HN, Polymarket, Bluesky, etc.) in parallel, scoring results by real engagement metrics instead of SEO. The v3 engine features intelligent pre-research entity resolution, cross-source cluster merging, single-pass comparisons, HTML briefs, and GitHub person-mode. Supports 50+ agent hosts including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, and Gemini CLI. 40.4k stars, MIT license, 1,012 tests.
chinese_summary: 一款 AI Agent 技能工具，可并行搜索 Reddit、X、YouTube、TikTok、HN、Polymarket、Bluesky 等 14+ 社交平台，按真实用户参与度而非 SEO 进行排序评分。v3 引擎新增智能预研实体解析、跨源聚类合并、单次对比、HTML 简报和 GitHub 人物模式。兼容 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Copilot、Gemini CLI 等 50+ Agent 宿主机，40.4k 星，MIT 协议，1012 个测试用例。
